priority_items: {'rubric_item_id': 'ri_1', 'notes': 'Main CSV present and exclusion logic indicated, but reproducibility (eligible-only normalization) and citation format are weak or inconsistent.'}

planned_changes: Recompute road_distance_score for each row using an eligible-only normalization. Steps: (a) determine eligibility per row using flood_depth>1.0m or slope>10% rules; (b) form the eligible distance set (distances of rows not excluded); (c) if eligible set size >1 compute score = (max_distance_eligible - distance)/(max_distance_eligible - min_distance_eligible); if eligible set size ==1 assign score 1.0000; if eligible set size ==0 leave score blank or mark needs_review and document decision; (d) update ranking_among_eligible accordingly.

Update [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT] calculation_details cells to include the explicit arithmetic used (show min and max eligible distances and the substitution producing the numeric score). Ensure the numbers in calculation_details reproduce the road_distance_score column exactly.
Replace free-text source_citation entries with exact packet-token citations for every input used in the decision (examples: 'packet:cell A:distance_road=240m', 'packet:cell B:flood_depth=1.8m').
Create calculations_and_assumptions.txt documenting the scoring formula, handling of singleton eligible sets, and any ties, and include worked examples for the provided inputs (240, 140, 360).

Create decision_table_summary.csv that lists the exclusion thresholds and per-cell exclusion boolean outcomes (columns: cell_id, flood_depth_m, slope_pct, exclude_flood_gt_1m, exclude_slope_gt_10pct, excluded_reason).

Run deterministic precheck and include the resulting precheck metadata in the final submission. If rubric indeed requires only the CSV, document in final_message.txt that supporting files were added for traceability but are not required by the artifact-contract; if rubric requires them, ensure expected_deliverable_items are updated so precheck checks for them.
Update final_message.txt to reference the added files and note the reproducibility checks performed (show lines demonstrating reproduced calculations).
raw_llm_output.revision_reason: Resolve eligible-set normalization inconsistency, make calculation steps reproducible and machine-traceable, switch citations to exact packet-token format, and clarify whether supporting calculation/decision artifacts are required.

metadata_json.revision_goal: The main CSV artifact is present and applies exclusion logic, but there are three issues preventing full credit: (1) an internal inconsistency in how eligible-set normalization was applied (calculation_details indicate the distance 360 was used even though cell C is marked 'excluded'); (2) source_citation values do not use the exact packet-token format required by the rubric; (3) the model grader claims missing supporting files, but the deterministic artifact-contract shows only the CSV as expected - this ambiguity should be resolved by either adding documented supporting artifacts or aligning grader assertions with the artifact-contract. Addressing (1) and (2) and clarifying deliverable scope will enable full reproducibility and traceability.
